paragraphs.text: 这是第11篇初级文章。今天我们来读一篇有意思的故事。
paragraphs.translation: This is elementary article number 11. Today let's read an interesting story.

paragraphs.text: 读完之后，想一想故事讲了什么。你能回答老师的问题吗？
paragraphs.translation: After reading, think about what the story was about. Can you answer the teacher's questions?

paragraphs.text: 每天坚持阅读，你的中文会越来越好！
paragraphs.translation: Keep reading every day, and your Chinese will get better and better!
